ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Fee_Type__c , 'Service Fee') , OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Intercompany_Service_Fee__c , '--None--'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Intercompany_Service_Fee__c , '') )), true, false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Intercompany Service Fee? is required for Service Fee schedule.
